title: v0.6.1 CSP model-download hotfix release notes
summary: v0.6.1 is a patch hotfix over v0.6.0 that preserves the task-first UI release and allows the committed public Hugging Face model-download origin in production Content Security Policy so the explicit Install model action can fetch the base speech model.
changes: Adds the exact committed model-file origin `https://huggingface.co` to Vercel `connect-src`.
Keeps direct-route SPA fallback and existing COOP/COEP/Permissions-Policy/security headers intact.
Adds static Vercel tests that derive installable model origins from committed manifests and reject wildcard or broad CSP sources.
Documents the CSP troubleshooting pattern for model downloads.
unchangedFromV060: No UI, model-pack, profile, adapter, portable-bundle, storage, training, or privacy schema contract changes beyond the deployment CSP header.
No telemetry, analytics, remote logging, account service, or broad third-party network allowance was added.
v0.6.0 release artifacts and tag are intentionally left immutable; this patch release supersedes them for production model-download installs.
knownLimitations: Issue #255 remains open for final moderated release-usability participant evidence.
Production accuracy and reference-hardware performance evidence limitations from ADR 0004 and ADR 0005 remain unresolved.
Manual Windows NVDA/Edge and macOS VoiceOver/Safari accessibility matrix rows remain accepted limitations until run outside the Linux agent environment.
releaseAssetsPlanned: GitHub source archives generated by GitHub from tag v0.6.1
speech-web-v0.6.1-dist.tar.gz generated from the tagged commit
verificationPlan: Required CI passes on the v0.6.1 release-prep PR and clean main commit.
Production alias returns direct routes with CSP `connect-src 'self' https://huggingface.co`.
Browser smoke clicks Install model on production with Hugging Face requests intercepted and observes no CSP console errors.
